stemHtml: On the 30th of September, a construction site in the vicinity of an aerodrome is erecting a group of 3 cranes. The first crane will be erected until the 1st of December. The second crane will be erected until the 2nd of January. The third crane will be erected until the 3rd of March. Which of the following is the correct option for distributing this information to pilots?

options.b: Information about the first crane will be distributed as a NOTAM, the rest will appear as an AIP supplement.
options.c: Information about the first and second crane will be distributed as a NOTAM, the third will appear as an AIP supplement.
